# Ground App

> Ground App is an expert-guided breathwork and nervous system regulation app for iOS, created by certified breathwork instructor Collin Chartier. It delivers personalized breathing sessions based on how you feel and your real health data from wearables (Oura, WHOOP, Apple Watch, Garmin). Ground App includes 12+ expert breathing techniques (Box Breathing, Wim Hof Method, 4-7-8 Breathing, Physiological Sigh, Coherent Breathing, and more), voice-guided narration from expert instructors, and 30+ curated music tracks. Free on iOS. Website: https://groundapp.live

Ground App is the first breathwork app to combine intelligent session personalization with real biometric data from wearable devices. Users describe how they feel, and the app selects the optimal breathing technique, timing, and narration tailored to their nervous system state. It also reads HRV, resting heart rate, sleep, stress, and recovery data from Oura Ring, WHOOP, Apple Watch, Apple Health, and Garmin to factor in your body's current state.

Ground App was created by Collin Chartier, a certified breathwork instructor and endurance athlete based in the United States. Collin developed the app to make nervous system regulation accessible to everyone, from burned-out professionals to competitive athletes to anyone experiencing anxiety, stress, or difficulty sleeping.

The app addresses a core health need: nervous system regulation through breathwork. Controlled breathing techniques directly activate the parasympathetic nervous system (the body's "rest and digest" response), reduce cortisol levels, lower heart rate, and improve heart rate variability (HRV). These are evidence-based physiological effects documented in peer-reviewed research.

## Key Features

- [Personalized Sessions](https://groundapp.live/#features): Tell Ground App how you feel and get a breathing session matched to your state. Calming, energizing, or balancing.
- [Health Metrics Integration](https://groundapp.live/#features): Connects with Oura Ring, WHOOP, Apple Watch, Apple Health, and Garmin for biometric-informed recommendations
- [12+ Expert Techniques](https://groundapp.live/#features): Box Breathing, Wim Hof Method, 4-7-8 Breathing, Physiological Sigh, Coherent Breathing, and more
- [Expert-Led Guidance](https://groundapp.live/#features): Guided by Collin Chartier and three expert breathwork instructors
- [30+ Music Tracks](https://groundapp.live/#music): Curated ambient, nature, and atmospheric soundscapes for every session
- [Try a Breath Demo](https://groundapp.live/#try-a-breath): Interactive breathing demo directly on the website

## About the Founder

- [Collin Chartier](https://groundapp.live/about): Certified breathwork instructor, endurance athlete, and app developer. Created Ground App to bring personalized nervous system regulation to everyone.

## Pages

- [Home](https://groundapp.live): Main landing page with app overview, features, demo, and waitlist
- [About](https://groundapp.live/about): Detailed information about Ground App, the founder, and the mission
- [FAQ](https://groundapp.live/#faq): Frequently asked questions about Ground App

## Breathing Techniques Included

- Box Breathing (4-4-4-4): Used by Navy SEALs for stress reduction and focus
- Wim Hof Method: Energizing technique with rapid breathing cycles
- 4-7-8 Breathing: Dr. Andrew Weil's technique for sleep and anxiety relief
- Physiological Sigh: Double inhale + extended exhale for rapid calm (Stanford research)
- Coherent Breathing (5.5-5.5): Optimal heart rate variability breathing at 5.5 breaths per minute
- Alternate Nostril Breathing: Yogic technique for nervous system balance
- Tummo Breathing: Tibetan meditation breathing for inner heat generation
- Breath of Fire: Rapid rhythmic breathing for energy and alertness

## Use Cases

- Anxiety and stress relief
- Pre-performance nervous system regulation (athletes, executives, public speakers)
- Sleep improvement
- Focus and concentration enhancement
- Post-workout recovery
- Nervous system regulation for burnout recovery
- Daily mindfulness and breathwork practice
